title: Engineer Software Development II
description:
**Position Overview**
 We are seeking an Engineer II to join our cloud\\-based Network Management System (NMS) development team. This entry\\-level position is perfect for recent graduates or early\\-career engineers who want to build expertise in network management software while working on cutting\\-edge cloud platforms that manage enterprise network infrastructure including switches, routers, and WiFi access points.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Feature Development: Implement well\\-defined features for network device monitoring and management interfaces under senior engineer guidance
* UI Component Development: Build responsive web components for network dashboards, device status displays, and configuration forms
* API Integration: Integrate frontend components with existing backend APIs for device data retrieval and configuration
* Bug Fixes: Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve software defects in network management applications
* Testing: Write unit tests and perform integration testing for network management features
* Documentation: Create and maintain technical documentation for implemented features
* Code Reviews: Participate in code review processes and learn from senior team members
* Learning \\& Development: Actively learn networking fundamentals, cloud technologies, and company\\-specific domain knowledge
* Quality Assurance: Support QA processes by testing network device integrations and user workflows
* Minor Enhancements: Implement small improvements to existing network monitoring and configuration tools


**Technical Requirements**
* Frontend Basics: Foundational knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and one modern framework (React.js preferred)
* Backend Fundamentals: Basic understanding of RESTful APIs, JSON, and server\\-side programming (Node.js, Python, or Java)
* Database Basics: Understanding of SQL databases and basic query operations
* Version Control: Proficiency with Git for collaborative development
* Development Tools: Familiarity with modern IDEs, debugging tools, and basic command\\-line operations
* Web Technologies: Understanding of HTTP protocols, web security basics, and responsive design
* Learning Aptitude: Strong willingness to learn networking concepts, cloud platforms, and domain\\-specific technologies


**Networking Knowledge (Training Provided)**
* Basic understanding of TCP/IP and networking fundamentals
* Curiosity about network devices and infrastructure management
* Interest in learning about network protocols, device configuration, and monitoring systems
* No prior network management experience required \\- comprehensive training provided


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related technical field
* 2\\-4 years of software development experience (internships and projects count)
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail
* Good communication skills and ability to work collaboratively
* Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies
* Basic understanding of software development lifecycle


**Growth Opportunities**
* Comprehensive onboarding program covering networking fundamentals and NMS concepts
* Mentorship from senior engineers with networking and cloud expertise
* Hands\\-on training with network devices and management protocols
* Career development path toward network software specialization


**Company Statement/Values**
 At NETGEAR, we are on a mission to unleash the full potential of connectivity with intelligent solutions that delight and protect. We turn ideas into innovative networking products that connect people, power businesses, and advance the way we live.
   

  

 We're a performance\\-driven, talented and connected team that's committed to delivering world\\-class products for our customers. As a company, we value our employees as the most essential building blocks of our success. And as teammates, we commit to taking our work to the
 *Next Gear* 
 by living our values: we
 **Dare to Transform** 
 the future,
 **Connect and Delight** 
 our customers,
 **Communicate Courageously** 
 with each other and collaborate to
 **Win It Together** 
 . You’ll find our values woven through our processes, present in our decisions, and celebrated throughout our culture.
   

  

 We strive to attract top talent and create a great workplace where people feel engaged, inspired, challenged, proud and respected. If you are creative, forward\\-thinking, passionate about technology and are looking for a rewarding career to make an impact, then you've got what it takes to succeed at NETGEAR. Join our network and help us shape the future of connectivity.
   

  

*NETGEAR hires based on merit. All qualified applicants will receive equal consideration for employment. All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.*

title: Software Engineer
description:
At Warner Music Group, We’re a Global Collective Of Music Makers And Music Lovers, Tech Innovators And Inspired Entrepreneurs, Game\\-changing Creatives And Passionate Team Members. Here, We Turn Dreams Into Stardom And Audiences Into Fans. We Are Guided By Three Core Values That Underpin Everything We Do Across All Our Diverse Businesses
   

  

* Curiosity: We do our best work when we’re immersing ourselves in culture and breaking through barriers. Curiosity is the driving force behind creativity and ingenuity. It fuels innovation, and innovation is the key to our future.
* Collaboration: Making music and bringing it to the world is all about the power of originality amplified by teamwork. A great idea, like a great song, travels globally. We ignite passions and build connections across our diverse community of artists, songwriters, partners, and fans.
* Commitment: We pursue excellence for our team and our talent. Everything in music starts with a leap into the unknown, and we’re committed to keeping the faith, acting with integrity, and delivering on our promises.


 Warner Music Group (WMG) is a global music entertainment company with a rich history and a diverse roster of artists, a diverse roster of artists, such as Ed Sheeran, Dua Lipa, Diljit Dosanjh, Armaan Malik, Darshan Raval, and Ayushmann Khurrana. We are committed to innovation and leveraging technology to enhance the music experience for our artists and fans.
   

  

 WMG is home to a wide range of artists, musicians, and songwriters that fuel our success. That is why we are committed to creating a work environment that actively values, appreciates, and respects everyone. We encourage applications from people with a wide variety of backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Consider a career at WMG and get the best of both worlds \\- an innovative global music company that retains the creative spirit of a nimble independent.
   

  

**Your Role**
 The role is within the Insights Services team that powers the data products, insights, and APIs used across WMG applications, such as the WMG One and the Pulse (Artist and Songwriter) applications. We provide meaningful, actionable, fresh, and timely insights to empower our customers to make informed, effective decisions. The Insights Services team owns the production of micro insights, such as big movers in key metrics, and the APIs serving for both micro and scaled insights. An example of a micro insight is "Your track grew streams by more than 10% today!" This is a unique opportunity to be a part of a new, high\\-performing engineering center of excellence and drive significant impact for WMG's technology initiatives.
   

  

 This role will collaborate closely with our North American Engineering teams to synchronize strategies, processes, and objectives. This is a hybrid position that requires you to work onsite at our Bangalore office a few days per week. We need strong engineers who love music, data, and building world\\-class systems that scale to solve problems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Reimagine and implement the future of tech for the music industry
* Work as part of a dynamic and highly effective team
* Own features though full development lifecycle – design, creation, test, deployment, maintenance
* Implement maintainable solutions with high quality and reliability that can scale as our business continues to grow and expand
* Learn and grow as a professional through close collaboration with your team members and engineering leaders, and by being part of culture of continuous improvement and learning


**About You**
* You have an undergraduate or graduate degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or other related field
* You have at least 4 years of experience in backend or full stack development
* You have a deep knowledge of AWS or other large cloud computing environment
* You have strong distributed systems skills: How to make things fast and scalable, how to measure things (e.g. latency, throughput)
* You have strong operational excellence best practices: Testing, monitoring, paging, and incident management
* You have a strong understanding of developing APIs, backend services, databases, data pipelines, data warehousing
* Tech stack consists of Databricks Data Products (analytical data, reverse\\-ETL, Lakebase/Postgres performance serving), Snowflake, Python for backend, Typescript and React for frontend, and AWS. Experience in this tech stack is a plus although not mandatory
* You have a high sense of ownership and a drive to deliver impact in a fast\\-paced, evolving, ambiguous environment
* You have strong debugging skills and the ability to diagnose and resolve complex issues
* You have a drive to grow, learn, and master the craft of software development


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

* Drive continuous improvement through process automation and tooling enhancements

* Experience with relational databases (Oracle, PostgreSQL) and writing SQL queries
* Effective communicator who can bridge technical and non\\-technical discussions
* Comfortable collaborating in distributed teams across multiple time zones

* Hands\\-on experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) to manage cloud resources, ideally in AWS

title: Data Scientist
description:

 Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises deploying advanced AI systems. Turing supports its clients through two primary avenues: first, by accelerating frontier research with high\\-quality data, sophisticated training pipelines, and top\\-tier AI researchers specializing in coding, reasoning, STEM, multilinguality, multimodality, and agents; and second, by applying this expertise to help enterprises transform AI from proof of concept into proprietary intelligence. The company’s systems are designed to perform reliably, deliver measurable impact, and generate lasting results on the profit and loss statements of its clients. Turing’s innovative approach and cutting\\-edge research make it a leader in the AI industry, fostering advancements that shape the future of technology and enterprise solutions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced Software Engineers (SWE Bench – Data Engineer / Data Science) to join our team and contribute to benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects. This role is integral to our efforts in assessing and enhancing the performance of advanced AI systems through real\\-world data engineering and data science workflows. The successful candidate will work hands\\-on with production\\-like datasets, developing and maintaining data pipelines, performing data analysis, and supporting model evaluation tasks. This position offers an excellent opportunity to collaborate with top researchers and engineers, applying your skills to challenging problems in AI benchmarking and system evaluation.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will possess a strong foundation in data engineering and data science, with the ability to work across various stages of data preparation, analysis, and model\\-related workflows within complex codebases. Your contributions will directly impact the development and refinement of AI systems, ensuring they meet rigorous standards of performance and reliability.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will have a minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience as a Data Engineer, Data Scientist, or Software Engineer with a focus on data workflows. Proficiency in Python is essential, as it is the primary language used in our workflows. Demonstrable experience with data processing, analysis, and model\\-related tasks is required, along with a solid understanding of machine learning and data science fundamentals. Experience working with both structured and unstructured data is vital, as is the ability to navigate and modify complex, real\\-world codebases. Candidates should be skilled in writing clean, reusable, and well\\-documented code, with strong problem\\-solving capabilities, especially in algorithmic or data\\-intensive scenarios. Excellent communication skills in English, both spoken and written, are necessary for effective collaboration within our team.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work with structured and unstructured datasets to support SWE Bench\\-style evaluation tasks, ensuring data quality and integrity.
* Design, develop, and validate data pipelines used in benchmarking and evaluation workflows to facilitate accurate performance assessments of AI systems.
* Perform data processing, analysis, feature engineering, and validation to support data science use cases and model evaluation.
* Write, run, and refine Python scripts for data processing and experimentation in local environments.
* Evaluate data quality, transformations, and outputs to ensure correctness, reproducibility, and adherence to project standards.
* Create clean, well\\-documented, and reusable data workflows that can be integrated into benchmarking processes.
* Participate in code reviews to maintain high standards of code quality, readability, and maintainability.
* Collaborate closely with researchers and engineers to design challenging, real\\-world data engineering and data science tasks that test AI system capabilities.


**Benefits**
 As a freelancer with Turing, you will enjoy the flexibility of working remotely from anywhere, allowing for a healthy work\\-life balance. You will have the opportunity to engage with cutting\\-edge AI projects alongside leading LLM companies, gaining valuable experience in advanced AI system evaluation and data workflows. Turing offers a dynamic and supportive environment where your skills can directly impact the development of innovative AI solutions. Additionally, working with Turing provides exposure to a global network of professionals, fostering continuous learning and career growth in the rapidly evolving field of artificial intelligence.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and applicants. We do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, religion, or any other protected status. We believe in fostering a workplace where everyone has the opportunity to succeed and contribute to our mission of advancing AI research and enterprise solutions.

 At New Relic, we provide businesses with a state\\-of\\-the\\-art observability platform, leveraging advanced technologies to deliver real\\-time insights into the performance of software applications and infrastructure. As a company at the forefront of the industry, we enable organizations to monitor, analyze, and optimize their systems to achieve enhanced reliability, performance, and user experience. Join us in our mission to revolutionize observability and empower businesses in today's dynamic digital landscape.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Drive the design, development, and enhancement of core features and functionalities of our observability platform, leveraging cutting\\-edge technologies to deliver scalable and reliable solutions
* Act as a subject matter expert, guiding and mentoring a team of talented software engineers to achieve technical excellence and deliver high\\-quality code
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to design and implement robust, scalable, and efficient systems that meet the demands of our growing customer base
* Stay ahead of industry trends and emerging technologies, constantly researching and experimenting with innovative solutions to enhance our observability platform
* Work closely with product managers, designers, and stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions, advocating for best practices and promoting a collaborative work environment
* Be proactive in identifying and addressing performance bottlenecks, applying optimizations, and maintaining the stability and availability of our platform
* Encourage a culture of continuous learning, improvement, and innovation within the engineering team, sharing knowledge and promoting professional growth


**This role requires**
* Bachelor’s degree, software development, engineering, or a related technical field
* 5\\+ years of experience working as a Backend software engineer working in Java and/or Go with a strong computer science background and an aptitude for learning new languages quickly
* Experience with strong backend technologies
* Demonstrated experience in designing, developing, and maintaining large\\-scale software systems, utilizing modern programming languages and frameworks
* Proven ability to lead and mentor a team of software engineers, guiding them towards technical excellence, and ensuring the delivery of high\\-quality code
* Strong understanding of scalable distributed systems and microservices architecture, with the ability to design and implement solutions that meet performance and scalability requirements
* Passion for exploring new technologies and finding creative solutions to complex problems, keeping up with industry trends and advancements in observability and related domains
* Excellent collaboration abilities, with the capacity to work effectively with cross\\-functional teams, present ideas, and communicate technical concepts clearly
* Keep up to date with technologies \\- AWS/Azure/GCP, serverless, Docker, Kubernetes among others


**Bonus points if you have**
* Contribution to open source projects
* Experience working with or building GraphQL schemas
* Experience building and maintaining high throughput pipelines and distributed systems
* Experience working on an Observability product, especially in the SaaS vendor space


 Fostering a diverse, welcoming and inclusive environment is important to us. We work hard to make everyone feel comfortable bringing their best, most authentic selves to work every day. We celebrate our talented Relics’ different backgrounds and abilities, and recognize the different paths they took to reach us – including nontraditional ones. Their experiences and perspectives inspire us to make our products and company the best they can be. We’re looking for people who feel connected to our mission and values, not just candidates who check off all the boxes.
   

  

 If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application or recruiting process, please reach out to resume@newrelic.com.
   

  

 We believe in empowering all Relics to achieve professional and business success through a flexible workforce model. This model allows us to work in a variety of workplaces that best support our success, including fully office\\-based, fully remote, or hybrid.
   

  

**Our hiring process**
 In compliance with applicable law, all persons hired will be required to verify identity and eligibility to work and to complete employment eligibility verification. Note: Our stewardship of the data of thousands of customers means that a criminal background check is required to join New Relic.
   

  

 We will consider qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records based on individual circumstances and in accordance with applicable law including, but not limited to, the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance.
   

  

 Headhunters and recruitment agencies may not submit resumes/CVs through this website or directly to managers. New Relic does not accept unsolicited headhunter and agency resumes, and will not pay fees to any third\\-party agency or company that does not have a signed agreement with New Relic.
   

  

 New Relic develops and distributes encryption software and technology that complies with U.S. export controls and licensing requirements. Certain New Relic roles require candidates to pass an export compliance assessment as a condition of employment in any global location. If relevant, we will provide more information later in the application process.
   

  

 Candidates are evaluated based on qualifications, regardless of race, religion, ethnicity, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, age, disability, neurodiversity, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 Review our Applicant Privacy Notice at https://newrelic.com/termsandconditions/applicant\\-privacy\\-policy

 We are looking for a

 to design and build scalable, high\\-performance systems that handle large volumes of data. You will work closely with cross\\-functional teams to deliver robust, efficient, and production\\-ready solutions.

 **Salesforce Expert** 
 to join our Software Engineering team.
 



 The ideal candidate has a passion for coding and a strong interest in supporting fellow developers, along with excitement for the opportunities that Cloud development offers. This individual enjoys sharing knowledge, helping others grow, and contributing to all stages of software delivery, from initial concepts to successful deployment, within a fast\\-moving team environment. title: Lead Data Engineer
description:
**Job Description** 




 We, at Jet2 (UK’s third largest airlines and the largest tour operator), have set up a state\\-of\\-the\\-art Technology and Innovation Centre in Pune, India.  We are rapidly growing and are looking for a
 **Lead Data Engineer** 
 to join our Business Intelligence (MSBI) team at Pune.
 



 As a part of J2TT, the successful candidate will represent J2TT BI team while working alongside the experienced BI team spread across Leeds in the UK.  Our BI development teams are dynamic, with the project approach being Agile in nature. The Data sets and databases that are being developed and utilised are mission critical to many of the teams in Jet2\\.com \\& Jet2Holidays.com and define how we utilise customer centric data to enhance the customer experience and help to provide further revenue for the business. The data platforms allow our colleagues to understand the trends in customer interaction. The Senior Data Engineer will work both alone and within a team to tight deadlines and will be supported by the team on an ongoing basis. This is a key role within our team as the Lead Data Engineer will help build and shape the data team from the ground up working with the Software Engineering Manager at the India Centre and the UK.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




 The successful candidate will be in a very hands\\-on team leadership role closely working with an expert team of Data Engineer across Pune and Leeds in a distributed Agile delivery model.
 



 ·       Own the design and delivery of innovative technical solutions to business problems; Deliver user stories, meeting your own goals while leading your team members ensuring overall team’s commitments are met on an ongoing basis
 



 ·       Coach junior Data Engineer in the team; Liaise with UK teams in daily stand ups and at all required technical forums while representing J2TT data team
 



 ·       Produce low\\-level solution designs for both yourself and the wider team to implement as part of your leadership role; Perform code reviews for the J2TT data team
 



 ·       Deliver high quality maintainable data code that you’ll be proud to support in future and will serve as exemplary for other team members
 



 ·       Perform task allocations and ensure optimum capacity management to deliver the sprint backlog
 



 ·       Share skills and techniques, helping drive quality improvements across the team
 



 ·       Work closely with your colleagues asking the right questions and ensuring that we build the right functionality from the start
 



 ·       Actively participate in agile activities, championing continuous improvement and promoting the agile way of working
 



 ·       Be a technical mascot /leader for the J2TT data delivery function to implement innovative technical solutions providing rapid value to business users through delivery of new functionality and enhancements to existing functionality
 



**Experience and Knowledge** 




 ·       Proven track record of leading BI development team(s)
 



 ·       Strong technical skills focused on the Microsoft SQL Server BI platform covering TSQL and SSIS with demonstrable commercial experience working with this technology stack and processing larger volumes of data
 



 ·       Experience of SSAS and SSRS.
 



 ·       Solid experience of working within an Agile framework
 



 ·       Rich experience of working with regions such as US, UK, Europe or Australia while leading an agile team
 



 ·       Rich experience in the area of logical and physical data modelling
 



 ·       Good understanding of the development lifecycle along with a strong BI development track record
 



 ·       Understand how data within the core business systems relates to business activity and constant improvement of business performance
 



 ·       Work with key stakeholders to understand business requirements from a data collation point of view, including all technical requirements to be input into the systems
 



 ·       Understand the mappings of source systems to data models in the target data warehouse schema and analytical cubes
 



 ·       Liaise with the BAs, developers, testers to fix defects
 



 ·       Previous experience of navigating defect tracking tools
 



**Skills and Behaviours Required** 




 We are looking for technologists who are passionate about data, analytics and technology
 



 ·       8\\+ years of strong relevant development experience on BI platforms
 



 ·       Highly skilled hands on technical team delivery leadership ability is must
 



 ·       Skills in solution definition and design that enable low\\-level solution to implement
 



 ·      
 **Must have** 
 rich
 
 previous experience and skills developing solutions on the
 **Microsoft SQL Server BI** 
 platform with strong
 **TSQL** 
 and
 **SSIS, SSAS, SSRS** 
 development skills
 



 ·       Any experience of the following tools and technologies would be
 **beneficial but not essential** 
 as you will have the opportunity to develop skills in some of these areas as part of this role:
 


* Cloud Platforms (Google Cloud Platform, Microsoft Azure and AWS)
* Snowflake Cloud Data Warehouse
* Restful API development/integration
* Apache Kafka, Apache NiFi and Apache Airflow
* Data Visualisation (specifically the use of Tableau Desktop and Tableau Server)
* C\\#, Java or Python programming skills
* SQL Server Reporting Services and SQL Server Analysis Services
* Master Data Services



 ·    Ability to lead team in a deadline\\-oriented environment while taking everyone together
 



 ·    Strong analytical skills and logical approach to problem solving
 



 ·    Methodical approach, with good attention to detail
 



 ·       Ability to question colleagues on how systems work
 



 ·       Ability to collaborate with teams from across the globe in a Distributed Agile Delivery model
 



 ·       Excellent problem\\-solving skills
 



 ·       Strong communication skills – Ability to work with international teams and across cultures
 



**Qualifications** 




 ·       Bachelor’s degree in information technology engineering or equivalent from reputed institute
 



 ·       Nice to have any industry certification
